message:
feat(tui): add incremental search within label and repo picker modals

Label and repo pickers now support typing to filter the list:
- Type characters to narrow the list by name substring match
- Backspace removes the last filter character
- Filter text shown as "Filter: /query" at the top of the picker
- ↑/↓ navigate within filtered results only
- Enter applies the selected filtered item
- Cursor resets to 0 when filter changes
- "No labels/repos match" message when filter has no results

Footer updated to "Type to filter | ↑/↓=navigate | Enter=apply | Esc=close"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
